sections.text:
In the heart of the Highlife night
Drums awake the ancient fire
Voices rise above the light
The groove pulls us higher

TEST_no_wav_marker
The phoenix flies tonight
Bikutsi in our soul
RIBA makes it right

From the river to the sun
We dance until the dawn appears
Every beat is one with one
Washing all our fears
